prompt:
You are a PROOF-FILLER. Replace the `sorry` placeholders for the listed declarations with complete, type-correct Lean proofs. Do NOT change statement signatures; do NOT weaken hypotheses.

## Integrity (HARD RULES â€” non-negotiable)
- Close a `sorry` ONLY with a genuine proof. NEVER discharge it with a device that makes the file compile without actually proving the statement: no new `axiom`, no `admit`, no unproven auxiliary `axiom`/lemma cited by `exact`, no `native_decide`/`decide` on a claim that is not genuinely decidable, no `@[implemented_by]`/`@[extern]` or `sorry` hidden inside a helper. Introducing an axiom for the hard part is a FAILURE, not a pass â€” it silently injects an assumption into the library.
- If a declaration is genuinely beyond you this turn, LEAVE its `sorry` exactly as it is (do not replace it with a fake discharge) and report honestly that you could not prove it, naming the decl and the concrete blocker (missing lemma, unclear step, integrability side-condition, etc.). A `sorry` left in place and reported is the CORRECT outcome when you don't know the proof; a fake discharge is never acceptable.

Lean files live under: /<repo-root>/CausalSmith/CausalSmith/Substrate/AffinePolynomialImageDimension
Target declarations: pderiv_polynomialPullback, totalDegree_pderiv_lt, eq_C_of_forall_pderiv_eq_zero, algebraicIndependent_of_polynomialJacobianMinor_ne_zero, polynomialImageClosure_dimension_of_jacobian

## Required final verification
BUILD GREEN BEFORE YOU STOP. Do not return until you have built every Lean module you edited and
confirmed 0 errors and no `sorry`/`admit` that you did not deliberately leave as a disclosed
blocker. Run the actual targeted build (`lake build <edited modules>` from the `CausalSmith`
package) as your LAST step and read its output; do not trust a proof merely because it looks right
in the editor. A proof that does not compile is not done. If you report a genuine blocker, every
other edited module must still build cleanly.

WARNING-FLOOD GUARD. Lake can emit enough replay warnings to truncate the terminal before its final
diagnostics and exit status. For the LAST verification, capture the complete build output to a
temporary file while preserving the build status, then print an explicit `BUILD_EXIT=<status>` and
the diagnostic tail. Do not treat a completed tool call or truncated warning-only output as success:
return only after the explicit preserved build status is `BUILD_EXIT=0`.

## Instructions
Fill all five `sorry`s in `CausalSmith/Substrate/AffinePolynomialImageDimension/Jacobian.lean`. Do not add `sorry`, `admit`, axioms, or paper/Helpers imports, and do not weaken either public theorem. You may refactor or replace the three private helpers if mathematically equivalent.

First reuse Mathlib declarations: `MvPolynomial.pderiv_monomial`, `pderiv_mul`, `pderiv_X`, `X_mul_pderiv_monomial`, `totalDegree_finsetSum_le`, `totalDegree_monomial(_le)`, `totalDegree_eq_zero_iff_eq_C`, `Matrix.eq_zero_of_mulVec_eq_zero`, `Matrix.det_transpose`, `AlgebraicIndependent.of_comp`, and `AlgebraicIndependent.cardinalMk_le_trdeg`.

Suggested proof: establish the substitution chain rule by `MvPolynomial.induction_on`. For the Jacobian criterion, use `algebraicIndependent_iff_injective_aeval`; from failure of injectivity obtain a nonzero relation in the substitution kernel with minimal total degree. Differentiate it. For the selected source columns, the chain-rule equations form the transpose of the declared Jacobian matrix times the vector of substituted relation partials. Its determinant is nonzero by `hminor`, so `Matrix.eq_zero_of_mulVec_eq_zero` makes every substituted partial zero. Minimality forces each nonzero formal partial to be impossible because its total degree strictly drops. Characteristic zero then shows a polynomial with all partials zero is constant, and a constant in the substitution kernel must be zero, contradicting the chosen relation.

For the dimension theorem, lift `f (rows a)` into `polynomialCoordinateSubalgebra f` using its range witness (the image of `MvPolynomial.X (rows a)`). Transfer algebraic independence through the injective subtype hom using `AlgebraicIndependent.of_comp`, apply `cardinalMk_le_trdeg`, simplify `#(Fin d)` to `d`, combine with `hupper` by antisymmetry, and invoke `polynomialImageClosure_dimension_of_trdeg`.

Compile repeatedly with `lake env lean CausalSmith/Substrate/AffinePolynomialImageDimension/Jacobian.lean`, then run `lake build CausalSmith.Substrate.AffinePolynomialImageDimension`. Finish only when both exit 0 and `rg -n '\bsorry\b|\badmit\b|^axiom\b' CausalSmith/Substrate/AffinePolynomialImageDimension --glob '*.lean'` returns no matches.

Use the lean-lsp MCP tools to develop/check your proof (diagnostics/goal). When done, output a
SHORT plain-text report: which decls you genuinely closed, which you left as `sorry` (with the
concrete blocker for each), the final `BUILD_EXIT=<status>` and diagnostic tail, and â€” required â€”
confirm you introduced NO `axiom`/`admit`/other non-proof discharge. No JSON required.
